title: Brotein anabolic rating card — Black Pepper Sirloin Steak
html:
iPhone 16 Pro Max simulator showing Brotein's scored food card — "MOST ANABOLIC" Black Pepper Sirloin Steak, 33g protein / 275 cal / 8/10 P/C ratio, with Gains/Energy/Digest/Value sub-scores. The anabolic scoring UI in working form.
